analysis.summary: Mastodon is a federated social network server implementing ActivityPub protocol. It provides a Ruby on Rails web application with REST/Streaming APIs, OAuth2 authentication, media handling, and real-time features for decentralized social networking.
capabilities: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb)
REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise)
Media attachment processing and storage (Gemfile: kt-paperclip, ruby-vips)
Full-text search using Elasticsearch integration (app/chewy/*.rb)
Background job processing with Sidekiq (Procfile: sidekiq worker)
Administrative interface for moderation and server management (app/controllers/admin/*.rb)
Multi-language internationalization support (package.json: @formatjs/intl-pluralrules)
Two-factor authentication support (Gemfile: devise-two-factor)
technical_stack: AWS S3 for media storage (Gemfile: aws-sdk-s3)
integrations: AWS S3 for media storage (Gemfile: aws-sdk-s3)

api_endpoints.path: REST API for client applications (app/controllers/api/v1/*.rb pattern)
Streaming API for real-time updates (streaming server)

technical_facts: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb)
REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise)
Media attachment processing and storage (Gemfile: kt-paperclip, ruby-vips)
Full-text search using Elasticsearch integration (app/chewy/*.rb)
Background job processing with Sidekiq (Procfile: sidekiq worker)
Administrative interface for moderation and server management (app/controllers/admin/*.rb)
Multi-language internationalization support (package.json: @formatjs/intl-pluralrules)
Two-factor authentication support (Gemfile: devise-two-factor)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: multi-threaded via Puma server, async job processing via Sidekiq, real-time streaming via WebSocket connections in Node.js
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (workflow files mentioned in README badges)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb), Background job processing with Sidekiq (Procfile: sidekiq worker), Administrative interface for moderation and server management (app/controllers/admin/*.rb) - manages complex workflows across multiple services and maintains state across federation
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: PostgreSQL 14 (docker-compose.yml, Gemfile: pg) as primary database with Rails models, ActivityPub protocol implementation requiring structured JSON-LD format
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: ActivityPub federation creates distributed social graph, Full-text search using Elasticsearch integration (app/chewy/*.rb) for graph traversal and relationship mapping
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: PostgreSQL 14 (docker-compose.yml, Gemfile: pg) as primary database, multi-threaded via Puma server, async job processing via Sidekiq for maintaining data consistency in federated network
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High reusability due to modular architecture with REST APIs, OAuth2 authentication, background job processing, and federation protocol. Core components (user management, content distribution, real-time streaming) are applicable to many social/collaborative platforms.

evidence_claims.evidence: ActivityPub federation for decentralized social networking (app/controllers/activitypub/*.rb)
REST API endpoints for client applications (app/controllers/api/*.rb)
Real-time streaming API using WebSocket connections (streaming/index.js)
OAuth2 authentication and authorization (Gemfile: omniauth, devise), Two-factor authentication support (Gemfile: devise-two-factor)

required_technologies: Ruby on Rails expertise (Ruby on Rails 8.1.0 (Gemfile))
Node.js for streaming (Node.js streaming server (streaming/package.json: express, ws))
